name: Iftekhar Ifti
about: Iftekhar Ifti is a versatile actor known for his compelling performances across television dramas, films, and digital content. With a career spanning several years, he has established himself as one of the most talented and dedicated performers in the industry. His ability to portray complex characters with depth and authenticity has earned him critical acclaim and a devoted fan following.

timeline.title: Career Beginnings
timeline.description: Started career with minor roles in television productions, showcasing natural talent and dedication to the craft.

timeline.title: First Leading Role
timeline.description: Landed the first major leading role in a prime-time drama, gaining widespread recognition for the performance.

timeline.title: Critical Acclaim
timeline.description: Received critical acclaim for a breakthrough performance, earning nomination for Best Actor at major award ceremonies.

timeline.title: Digital Debut
timeline.description: Expanded into digital content and web series, reaching a new global audience and showcasing versatility.

timeline.title: Music Career
timeline.description: Ventured into music, releasing debut single that resonated with fans and showcased another dimension of artistry.

timeline.title: International Projects
timeline.description: Currently working on international collaborations and upcoming projects that push creative boundaries.
